supported_devices: Humidifiers and dehumidifiers (separate independent relays, can alternate automatically)
compatible_sensors: TechGrow Temp/RH sensor, TechGrow S-4 CO2 sensor (temp/humidity readings only)
compatible_humidifiers: Any 230V humidifier up to 7A (humidifier relay, fused 7A); any 230V dehumidifier up to 14A (dehumidifier relay, fused 14A)
recommended_use_note: Advanced dual-relay humidity controller with independent humidifier and dehumidifier outputs plus automatic day/night setpoint switching via external light sensor. Alternates between humidifier and dehumidifier to maintain target humidity. Compatible with TechGrow DL-1 datalogger.
uvp_notes: Base price without sensor (techgrow.nl). Temp/RH sensor sold separately. Listed as out of stock on techgrow.nl at time of research.
notes: Dual-relay design: humidifier relay 8A switching (fused 7A), dehumidifier relay 15A switching (fused 14A). Controller alternates between humidifier and dehumidifier outputs to maintain target RH (10–90%). External light sensor connects via one of 3 UTP ports to enable automatic day/night setpoint switching — separate day and night humidity targets supported. Large 4×20 LCD. Sensor not included; 5m UTP cable included. TechGrow DL-1 datalogger compatible via third UTP port. Incompatible with S-2 and temp probe sensor types.
